partial_progress.details: Iteration 2 complete. Added 4 new lemmas for strict escape seed construction. Key insight: seed {G(neg(delta))} ∪ GContent(M') extends to MCS M'' that doesn't see M' back. The h_indep hypothesis (F(delta) not derivable from GContent(M')) is the remaining blocker. 14 sorries total (11 in DensityFrameCondition, 3 in CantorApplication).

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented strict escape seed infrastructure for reflexive_seriality_escape. Added StrictEscapeSeed definition, strict_escape_seed_implies_no_backward, strict_escape_seed_consistent, reflexive_seriality_escape_via_seed. Next: Pattern C fuel-based iteration to bypass h_indep requirement.
